# SafeGuard CCS

SafeGuard CCS provides cybersecurity consulting for small and mid-size businesses in Panama.

Website: https://safeguardccs.com/
Services:
- Cybersecurity consulting
- Security assessments
- Vulnerability remediation guidance
- IT hardening
- Backup and recovery readiness
- Cybersecurity awareness

Primary location: Panama
Contact: https://safeguardccs.com/#contact
